calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-29-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Ronald R. Cohn, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Pinnacle Business Finance, Inc.
No appearance by defendants Marche on the Square, LLC, a California limited liability company, Jacqueline Fan, a/k/a Jacqueline Y. Fan, an individual or Teresa N. Ho, a/k/a Teresa Nien Tsu Ho, an individual.
Defaults were entered against defendants on September 1, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on September 1, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on September 22, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Pinnacle Business Finance, Inc., and against the Defaulted Defendants Marche on the Square, LLC, a California limited liability company, Jacqueline Fan, a/k/a Jacqueline Y. Fan, an individual or Teresa N. Ho, a/k/a Teresa Nien Tsu Ho, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $34,033.12.
Prejudgment Interest - $5,537.40.
Attorney's Fees - $9,900.00.
Costs - $477.68, for a total judgement in the amount of $49,948.20.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2009 Continued To Nov-20-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
